detaileddescription.para: Collects all the values and stuffs into getReturnBuf. Returns size of all contents of getReturnBuf, in doubles. Puts number of returned values in getReturnBuf[0]. Note that these are likely to differ if the values returned are not doubles. Examines the eref to decide if this is a DataElement or a FieldElement. If a DataElement, scans through all data entries to fill the returnBuf. If a FieldElement, fills in field entries only of the one specified DataId on this eref.
